claims.summary: A retained telemetry sample must remain distinguishable from fresh reciprocal contact.
claims.disposition: verify wire receipt, freshness, health, reconnect, and last-valid-sample semantics

claims.summary: Pressure smoothing should preserve fast release, spikes, spectral drift, semantic thinning, and viscosity velocity inside a bounded history.
claims.disposition: verify dynamic window, pressure-scar, high-frequency, and motion-sensitive regressions

claims.summary: Unsupported telemetry majors should retain the last valid observation while surfacing incompatibility rather than dispatching blended data.
claims.disposition: verify unsupported-major retention and mismatch tests
